assertions.evidence: Plain markdown format, no JSON structure, no messages/es.json block. Not next-intl compatible.
'vivacidad frutal', 'profundidad achocolatada', 'acidez elegante', 'fruta roja', 'chocolate', 'cuerpo redondo' — rich sensory language throughout.
Has 'Para quien es este cafe' section with benefit-oriented bullets. Also communicates experience over specs in the description.
No CTA at all. Response ends with '250 g en grano o molido según tu método'. No 'Añadir al carrito' or equivalent e-commerce action.
